articles.title: Apple Music to add Transparency Tags to distinguish AI music, says report
articles.description: The label or distributor has to opt in to tagging their music as AI, so it's unclear how effective this intervention will be.

articles.author: Sarah Perez

articles.title: His house burned down. He used the insurance money to build PopSockets.
